title: Operations Visibility First Bounded Slice Planning
objective: Select exactly one first bounded Operations Visibility implementation or validation slice after the lane reopening decision while preserving the post-cutover operating constraints.
dependency_note: Packet 011 reopened the default Operations Visibility lane and selected this planning packet as the next bounded surface.
planning_requirements: Select exactly one first Operations Visibility implementation or validation slice.
Preserve Remote-SSH as the baseline-safe client path.
Treat the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI only as an optional host-supported comparison surface.

Keep package or lockfile mutation, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, and old-clone mutation closed unless the selected slice explicitly requires and reauthorizes them.
Name one later execution packet and one bounded validation expectation for that slice.
explicit_no_go_items: host-local VS Code desktop installation by implication
package or lockfile mutation by default
runtime or service mutation by default
decision_rationale: The PM drivers review surface is explicitly described in `apps/operations-web/public/pm-review/drivers.js` as the first bounded PM read-only review slice admitted into `apps/operations-web`.

`apps/operations-web/public/pm-review/drivers.test.mjs` uses only Node standard-library modules and direct source extraction, so it can run from Olares without package mutation, browser-runtime provisioning, or additional host tooling.
This is a narrower first Operations Visibility slice than the larger schedule surface and a smaller executable move than any browser-driven compare or promoted-host path.
The selected slice preserves Remote-SSH as the baseline-safe client path and keeps the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI optional rather than controlling.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 013 - Bounded PM Drivers Pure-Logic Validation Execution
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as the first bounded Operations Visibility planning surface after the post-cutover lane reopening decision. Packet 012 selected the PM drivers pure-logic validation slice as the smallest truthful first Operations Visibility follow-on and kept package or lockfile mutation, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, and old-clone mutation closed.
